payload.answer: mem_new was recalled because it is the current matching memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded, so returning it as a current fact would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context refers to Sam associated with Goldman; no additional disambiguating entity identifier was provided.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new matched the recall query for Sam from Goldman and is treated as the current durable memory.
mem_old also matched the query context but was excluded because it is superseded by a newer memory and is not current.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old is still valid, remove or revise its superseded status.
If mem_new is incorrect, supersede or delete mem_new and restore the appropriate current memory.
If there are multiple Sams from Goldman, add an entity identifier or additional disambiguating context.
